title: paspalum volcanense
intro: Paspalum volcanense is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in Central and South America, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Paspalum volcanense include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparation of Paspalum volcanense typically involves drying the leaves and using them in tea or tincture form, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
